title: Indiana Comprehensive Privacy Law Effective
description: Indiana's comprehensive consumer data privacy law takes effect, granting residents rights to access, delete, and opt out of the sale of personal data.

title: Kentucky Consumer Data Protection Act Effective
description: Kentucky's KCDPA takes effect with consumer rights modeled on Virginia's VCDPA.

title: Rhode Island Data Transparency and Privacy Protection Act Effective
description: Rhode Island's comprehensive privacy law takes effect covering consumer data rights.

title: Colorado Algorithmic Accountability Act Effective
description: Colorado's law requiring deployers of high-risk AI systems to conduct impact assessments and provide consumer disclosures takes effect.

title: EU AI Act — Full Implementation (Prohibited Practices)
description: Full implementation of the EU AI Act including enforcement of prohibited AI practices such as social scoring, real-time biometric identification in public spaces, and manipulative AI systems.

title: ANPD International Transfer Rules Effective (Brazil)
description: Brazil's ANPD international data transfer regulations under the LGPD take full effect, requiring standard contractual clauses for cross-border transfers.

title: CPPA ADMT Regulations Enforcement Begins
description: California Privacy Protection Agency begins enforcement of Automated Decision-Making Technology regulations requiring pre-use notices and opt-out rights.

title: California Delete Act (Opt Me Out) Effective
description: California's Delete Act establishing a browser-level mechanism for consumers to opt out of data broker activity takes effect.

title: EU AI Act — High-Risk AI Obligations Apply
description: Obligations for providers of high-risk AI systems (Annex III) begin, including conformity assessments, risk management, and data governance requirements.

title: Maryland Online Data Privacy Act Effective
description: Maryland's comprehensive privacy law takes effect with strict data minimization requirements and restrictions on targeted advertising to minors.

title: Minnesota Consumer Data Privacy Act Effective
description: Minnesota's comprehensive privacy law takes effect providing consumer data rights including a private right of action provision.

title: Nebraska Data Privacy Act Effective
description: Nebraska's comprehensive privacy law takes effect with data subject access, deletion, and opt-out rights.
